title: Custom Partitioners in Hadoop MapReduce
description: The 'lib/partition' directory in Hadoop MapReduce architecture houses custom partitioners, which are crucial for determining how data is distributed across reducers. The partitioners, such as BinaryPartitioner.java, HashPartitioner.java, and RehashPartitioner.java, extend the base `Partitioner<K, V>` class to implement unique partitioning strategies. BinaryPartitioner allows partitioning based on a subarray of bytes from a binary key. HashPartitioner uses the hash code of the key for partitioning, while RehashPartitioner rehashes the hash code to achieve a more uniform distribution. These partitioners collaborate within the MapReduce job to ensure efficient data processing by directing key-value pairs to the appropriate reducers, thereby implementing the Partitioner architectural pattern.

BinaryPartitioner allows partitioning based on a subarray of bytes from a binary key. These partitioners collaborate within the MapReduce job to ensure efficient data processing by directing key-value pairs to the appropriate reducers, thereby implementing the Partitioner architectural pattern.
